text.fullText: Brokers Carriers must tell the truck owner operator how much money the shipper is paying to move a load, what is the load, where to pick it up, where is going, what time to pick it up, what time is the delivery, how much is detention time. All of these must be information available for truck owner operator before taking a decision. Also, any time waiting for loading and unloading must be paid from minute one of arrival to the facility.
